name: How to change huggingface transformers default cache directory?
snippet: You can specify the cache directory whenever you load a model with .from_pretrained by setting the parameter cache_dir. You can also set a default location. Missing: pull 41808 fix

name: CI fails with dev dependencies: HFValidationError: Repo id must use
snippet: Fixed by huggingface/transformers#41808. Thanks for the fix, @zucchini-nlp! I have tested the main branch locally and it works as expected.

name: How to save and load model from local path in pipeline api ? #11808
snippet: In from_pretrained api, the model can be loaded from local path by passing the cache_dir. However, I have not found any parameter when using ... Missing: 41808 cached_file

name: cannot import name 'cached_path' from 'transformers.file_utils' #344
snippet: Failed to import optimum.onnxruntime.quantization because of the following error (look up to see its traceback): cannot import name 'cached_path' from ' ... Missing: 41808 | Show results with: 41808

name: cached_path disappeared from the API · Issue #21678 - GitHub
snippet: A tool using an older version of transformers uses from transformers.file_utils import cached_path. However, this api function disappeared sometime in 2022.
